summary: The diff updates HeroSection.tsx to use a new background image and maintains dark overlays for text readability. However, the image source used in the component points to the original uploaded file path (/assets/quality_restoration_20260224213607352.jpg) rather than the specified target path (frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png). There is no evidence in the diff that the image was saved/converted to the required PNG asset path.

missing_requirements.requirement: Save the uploaded yellow-to-red polygonal artwork as frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png (replacing existing file) and update HeroSection to reference this new asset path.
missing_requirements.reason: The HeroSection component references /assets/quality_restoration_20260224213607352.jpg (the original source file path) instead of /assets/generated/hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png. There are no added files in the diff, so the required PNG asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png was never created or saved. The acceptance criterion requiring the image to be saved at the specified path is not fulfilled.
